things.name: CERN & Globe of Science
things.description: Visit the world's largest particle physics laboratory and the Large Hadron Collider

things.name: Jet d'Eau
things.description: One of the world's tallest water fountains shooting 140 metres above Lake Geneva

things.name: Old Town (Vieille Ville)
things.description: Hilltop medieval quarter with the Cathedral of St Peter and Reformation Wall

things.name: Palace of Nations
things.description: European headquarters of the United Nations with guided tours

things.name: Lake Geneva
things.description: Europe's largest Alpine lake with Belle Epoque promenade and mountain views

things.name: International Red Cross Museum
things.description: Moving museum on humanitarian action, human rights and the Geneva Conventions

things.name: Patek Philippe Museum
things.description: Horological museum tracing 500 years of Geneva watchmaking excellence

things.name: Musee d'Art et d'Histoire
things.description: Geneva's main art and archaeology museum in a Belle Epoque palace

things.name: Botanical Garden
things.description: Botanical garden with arboretum, greenhouses and an animal reserve

things.name: Lausanne & Olympic Museum
things.description: Nearby Swiss Riviera city with the world's Olympic headquarters museum
